name: OpenClaw
setup: Use the generated OpenClaw workspace files directly: AGENTS.md, IDENTITY.md, SOUL.md, BOOTSTRAP.md, USER.md, TOOLS.md, MEMORY.md, HEARTBEAT.md, and .openclaw/workspace-state.json.
Keep generated skills/ with the workspace so clawpacker can include workspace-owned skill implementations.
Attach project files or workspace permissions before running codebase-reading tasks.
Run clawpacker inspect or validate on the generated workspace before packaging it as .ocpkg.
notes: This export is shaped as an OpenClaw workspace, not only as a single skill document.
OpenClaw-like platforms often differ in shell and file-search behavior.
Run evals after setup to catch hidden dependency gaps.
